det_check_template:
proof fn det_page_to_container_tree_version_1(page_ptr: PagePtr, page_perm: Tracked<PagePerm4k>, parent_container: ContainerPtr, parent_rev_ptr: SLLIndex, init_quota: Quota, new_cpus: ArraySet<NUM_CPUS>, depth: usize, subtree_set: Ghost<Set<ContainerPtr>>, uppertree_seq: Ghost<Seq<ContainerPtr>>, root_process: Option<ProcPtr>, r1: (ContainerPtr, Tracked<PointsTo<Container>>), r2: (ContainerPtr, Tracked<PointsTo<Container>>))
    requires (page_perm@.is_init()), (page_perm@.addr() == page_ptr),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r1.0 == page_ptr)
            &&& (r1.1@.addr() == page_ptr)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owned_procs.wf())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owned_procs@ =~= Seq::<ProcPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().parent =~= Some(parent_container))
            &&& (r1.1@.value().parent_rev_ptr =~= Some(parent_rev_ptr))
            &&& (r1.1@.value().children.wf())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().children@ =~= Seq::<ContainerPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().children.len() == 0)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owned_endpoints@ =~= Set::<EndpointPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().quota =~= init_quota)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owned_cpus =~= new_cpus)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().scheduler.wf())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().scheduler@ =~= Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().owned_threads@ =~= Set::<ThreadPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r1.1@.value().depth =~= depth)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().subtree_set =~= subtree_set)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().uppertree_seq =~= uppertree_seq)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().root_process == root_process)
            &&& (r1.1@.value().can_have_children =~= false)
            &&& (r2.1@.is_init())
            &&& (r2.0 == page_ptr)
            &&& (r2.1@.addr() == page_ptr)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owned_procs.wf())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owned_procs@ =~= Seq::<ProcPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().parent =~= Some(parent_container))
            &&& (r2.1@.value().parent_rev_ptr =~= Some(parent_rev_ptr))
            &&& (r2.1@.value().children.wf())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().children@ =~= Seq::<ContainerPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().children.len() == 0)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owned_endpoints@ =~= Set::<EndpointPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().quota =~= init_quota)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owned_cpus =~= new_cpus)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().scheduler.wf())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().scheduler@ =~= Seq::<ThreadPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().owned_threads@ =~= Set::<ThreadPtr>::empty())
            &&& (r2.1@.value().depth =~= depth)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().subtree_set =~= subtree_set)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().uppertree_seq =~= uppertree_seq)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().root_process == root_process)
            &&& (r2.1@.value().can_have_children =~= false)
        }) ==> det_page_to_container_tree_version_1_equal(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
